base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of menu_button_gradient — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 dragon quest. Gradient rectangular button — 3 color variants (black/orange/blue). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Gradient rectangular button — 3 color variants (black/orange/blue); used as menu-option backplate for Fight/Spell/Item/Run choices
